meanings.definition: increase by a factor of two
examples: doubling with a computer took no time at all

meanings.definition: raising the stakes in a card game by a factor of 2
examples: I decided his double was a bluff

meanings.definition: bend over or curl up, usually with laughter or pain
do double duty; serve two purposes or have two functions
examples: She doubles as his wife and secretary

meanings.definition: bridge: make a demand for (a card or suit)
make or do or perform again
examples: He could never replicate his brilliant performance of the magic trick
